notes:
What's new:
• Dialog Size: Fully compact Add Download dialog matching macOS exactly (reverted height buffers and skipped DWM frame decorations).
• Clipper Location: Dynamically resolves ffmpeg.exe path across dest_dir, tools, and AppData directories to prevent Clipper failures.
• Size Progress: Parses estimated/actual download size from yt-dlp section progress streams even in the presence of ANSI terminal escape codes.
